option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.*?> <?import javafx.scene.control.*?>
<!-- Header commun réutilisable --> <VBox xmlns="http://javafx.com/javafx/17" xmlns:fx="http://javafx.com/fxml" style="-fx-background-color: #0b0f10;"> <HBox style="-fx-background-color: #071011; -fx-padding: 10 20;" alignment="CENTER_LEFT"> <Label text="MIDGAR" style="-fx-text-fill: #18E3A4; -fx-font-size: 24; -fx-font-weight: bold;"/> <Region HBox.hgrow="ALWAYS"/> <HBox spacing="15"> <Label text="Français" style="-fx-text-fill: #fff;"/> <Label text="€ EUR" style="-fx-text-fill: #fff;"/> </HBox> </HBox> <HBox style="-fx-background-color: #0b0f10; -fx-padding: 15 20;" alignment="CENTER"> <Label text="MIDGAR" style="-fx-text-fill: #18E3A4; -fx-font-size: 20; -fx-font-weight: 800;"/> <Region HBox.hgrow="ALWAYS"/> <HBox spacing="30"> <Button text="ACCUEIL" styleClass="nav-button"/> <Button text="DÉCOUVRIR" styleClass="nav-button"/> <Button text="UNIVERS" styleClass="nav-button"/> <Button text="PERSONNAGES" styleClass="nav-button"/> <Button text="BOUTIQUE" styleClass="nav-button"/> <Button text="DÉFIS" styleClass="nav-button"/> </HBox> <Region HBox.hgrow="ALWAYS"/> <HBox spacing="15"> <Button text="" styleClass="icon-button"/> <Button text="" styleClass="icon-button"/> <Button text="" styleClass="icon-button"/> </HBox> </HBox> </VBox>

option.name: originalContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<?import javafx.scene.layout.*?> <?import javafx.scene.control.*?> <?import javafx.scene.image.*?> <?import javafx.geometry.Insets?> <?import javafx.scene.text.*?>
<AnchorPane xmlns="http://javafx.com/javafx" xmlns:fx="http://javafx.com/fxml" fx:controller="com.midgar.controller.PersonnageDetailController" style="-fx-background-color: #0d1117;">
<VBox spacing="0" AnchorPane.leftAnchor="0" AnchorPane.rightAnchor="0">
<!-- Character Header --> <HBox style="-fx-padding: 40 100;" spacing="40"> <ImageView fitWidth="300" fitHeight="400" style="-fx-background-color: #1a1f1e; -fx-background-radius: 10;"/>
<VBox spacing="15" HBox.hgrow="ALWAYS"> <Label text="Nom du personnage" style="-fx-text-fill: #fff; -fx-font-size: 32; -fx-font-weight: bold;"/> <Label text="Rôle: Héros / Villain / Neutre" style="-fx-text-fill: #18E3A4;"/> <Label text="Univers: Nom de l'univers" style="-fx-text-fill: #888;"/>
<VBox spacing="10"> <Label text="Description" style="-fx-text-fill: #fff; -fx-font-weight: bold;"/> <Label text="Description du personnage..." style="-fx-text-fill: #b0b9b6;" wrapText="true" maxWidth="500"/> </VBox>
<HBox spacing="20"> <Button text="Modifier" style="-fx-background-color: #18E3A4; -fx-text-fill: #0b0f10; -fx-font-weight: bold; -fx-padding: 12 20;"/> <Button text="Partager" style="-fx-background-color: #2a3139; -fx-text-fill: #fff; -fx-padding: 12 20;"/> </HBox> </VBox> </HBox>
<!-- Character Details --> <VBox style="-fx-background-color: #0b0f10; -fx-padding: 40 100;" spacing="30"> <HBox spacing="40"> <VBox spacing="15" minWidth="250"> <Label text="Attributs" style="-fx-text-fill: #fff; -fx-font-size: 20; -fx-font-weight: bold;"/> <VBox spacing="8"> <HBox alignment="CENTER_LEFT"> <Label text="Force" style="-fx-text-fill: #888;"/> <Region HBox.hgrow="ALWAYS"/> <Label text="8/10" style="-fx-text-fill: #fff;"/> </HBox> <ProgressBar progress="0.8" style="-fx-pref-width: 200;"/> <HBox alignment="CENTER_LEFT"> <Label text="Intelligence" style="-fx-text-fill: #888;"/> <Region HBox.hgrow="ALWAYS"/> <Label text="7/10" style="-fx-text-fill: #fff;"/> </HBox> <ProgressBar progress="0.7" style="-fx-pref-width: 200;"/> <HBox alignment="CENTER_LEFT"> <Label text="Agilité" style="-fx-text-fill: #888;"/> <Region HBox.hgrow="ALWAYS"/> <Label text="9/10" style="-fx-text-fill: #fff;"/> </HBox> <ProgressBar progress="0.9" style="-fx-pref-width: 200;"/> </VBox> </VBox>
<VBox spacing="15" minWidth="250"> <Label text="Histoire" style="-fx-text-fill: #fff; -fx-font-size: 20; -fx-font-weight: bold;"/> <Label text="L'histoire du personnage..." style="-fx-text-fill: #b0b9b6;" wrapText="true" maxWidth="400"/> </VBox> </HBox> </VBox>
</VBox>
</AnchorPane>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<?import javafx.scene.layout.*?> <?import javafx.scene.control.*?> <?import javafx.scene.image.*?> <?import javafx.geometry.Insets?> <?import javafx.scene.text.*?>
<AnchorPane xmlns="http://javafx.com/javafx" xmlns:fx="http://javafx.com/fxml" fx:controller="com.midgar.controller.PersonnageDetailController" style="-fx-background-color: #0d1117;">
<fx:include source="partials/header.fxml" AnchorPane.leftAnchor="0" AnchorPane.rightAnchor="0" AnchorPane.topAnchor="0"/>
<VBox spacing="0" AnchorPane.leftAnchor="0" AnchorPane.rightAnchor="0" AnchorPane.topAnchor="100">
<!-- Character Header --> <HBox style="-fx-padding: 40 100;" spacing="40"> <ImageView fitWidth="300" fitHeight="400" style="-fx-background-color: #1a1f1e; -fx-background-radius: 10;"/>
<VBox spacing="15" HBox.hgrow="ALWAYS"> <Label text="Nom du personnage" style="-fx-text-fill: #fff; -fx-font-size: 32; -fx-font-weight: bold;"/> <Label text="Rôle: Héros / Villain / Neutre" style="-fx-text-fill: #18E3A4;"/> <Label text="Univers: Nom de l'univers" style="-fx-text-fill: #888;"/>
<VBox spacing="10"> <Label text="Description" style="-fx-text-fill: #fff; -fx-font-weight: bold;"/> <Label text="Description du personnage..." style="-fx-text-fill: #b0b9b6;" wrapText="true" maxWidth="500"/> </VBox>
<HBox spacing="20"> <Button text="Modifier" style="-fx-background-color: #18E3A4; -fx-text-fill: #0b0f10; -fx-font-weight: bold; -fx-padding: 12 20;"/> <Button text="Partager" style="-fx-background-color: #2a3139; -fx-text-fill: #fff; -fx-padding: 12 20;"/> </HBox> </VBox> </HBox>
<!-- Character Details --> <VBox style="-fx-background-color: #0b0f10; -fx-padding: 40 100;" spacing="30"> <HBox spacing="40"> <VBox spacing="15" minWidth="250"> <Label text="Attributs" style="-fx-text-fill: #fff; -fx-font-size: 20; -fx-font-weight: bold;"/> <VBox spacing="8"> <HBox alignment="CENTER_LEFT"> <Label text="Force" style="-fx-text-fill: #888;"/> <Region HBox.hgrow="ALWAYS"/> <Label text="8/10" style="-fx-text-fill: #fff;"/> </HBox> <ProgressBar progress="0.8" style="-fx-pref-width: 200;"/> <HBox alignment="CENTER_LEFT"> <Label text="Intelligence" style="-fx-text-fill: #888;"/> <Region HBox.hgrow="ALWAYS"/> <Label text="7/10" style="-fx-text-fill: #fff;"/> </HBox> <ProgressBar progress="0.7" style="-fx-pref-width: 200;"/> <HBox alignment="CENTER_LEFT"> <Label text="Agilité" style="-fx-text-fill: #888;"/> <Region HBox.hgrow="ALWAYS"/> <Label text="9/10" style="-fx-text-fill: #fff;"/> </HBox> <ProgressBar progress="0.9" style="-fx-pref-width: 200;"/> </VBox> </VBox>
<VBox spacing="15" minWidth="250"> <Label text="Histoire" style="-fx-text-fill: #fff; -fx-font-size: 20; -fx-font-weight: bold;"/> <Label text="L'histoire du personnage..." style="-fx-text-fill: #b0b9b6;" wrapText="true" maxWidth="400"/> </VBox> </HBox> </VBox>
</VBox>
</AnchorPane>

option.name: originalContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<?import javafx.scene.layout.*?> <?import javafx.scene.control.*?> <?import javafx.scene.image.*?> <?import javafx.geometry.Insets?> <?import javafx.scene.text.*?>
<AnchorPane xmlns="http://javafx.com/javafx/17" xmlns:fx="http://javafx.com/fxml" fx:controller="com.example.app.controllers.PersonnageController" style="-fx-background-color: #0d1117;">
<VBox spacing="15" AnchorPane.leftAnchor="0" AnchorPane.rightAnchor="0" AnchorPane.topAnchor="0" AnchorPane.bottomAnchor="0">
<padding> <Insets top="20" right="20" bottom="20" left="20"/> </padding>
<Label text="PERSONNAGES" style="-fx-text-fill: #18E3A4; -fx-font-size: 28px; -fx-font-weight: bold;"/>
<!-- Barre de recherche --> <HBox spacing="10"> <TextField fx:id="searchField" promptText="Rechercher un personnage..." HBox.hgrow="ALWAYS" style="-fx-background-color: #1a1f1e; -fx-text-fill: white; -fx-prompt-text-fill: #888; -fx-border-color: #2a3139; -fx-border-radius: 10;"/> <Button text="Rechercher" onAction="#search" style="-fx-background-color: #18E3A4; -fx-text-fill: #0b0f10; -fx-background-radius: 10; -fx-padding: 8 15;"/> <Button text="Réinitialiser" onAction="#resetFilters" style="-fx-background-color: transparent; -fx-border-color: #18E3A4; -fx-text-fill: #18E3A4; -fx-background-radius: 10; -fx-padding: 8 15;"/> <Button text="Créer" onAction="#createPersonnage" style="-fx-background-color: #18E3A4; -fx-text-fill: #0b0f10; -fx-background-radius: 10; -fx-padding: 8 15;"/> </HBox>
<!-- Filtres --> <HBox spacing="20"> <VBox spacing="5"> <Label text="Classe" style="-fx-text-fill: #18E3A4; -fx-font-size: 14px; -fx-font-weight: bold;"/> <ListView fx:id="classRoleFilter" prefHeight="200" prefWidth="150" style="-fx-background-color: #1a1f1e; -fx-border-color: #2a3139; -fx-border-radius: 10;"/> </VBox> <VBox spacing="5"> <Label text="Univers" style="-fx-text-fill: #18E3A4; -fx-font-size: 14px; -fx-font-weight: bold;"/> <ListView fx:id="universeFilter" prefHeight="200" prefWidth="150" style="-fx-background-color: #1a1f1e; -fx-border-color: #2a3139; -fx-border-radius: 10;"/> </VBox> <VBox spacing="5"> <Label text="Trier par" style="-fx-text-fill: #18E3A4; -fx-font-size: 14px; -fx-font-weight: bold;"/> <ComboBox fx:id="sortCombo" prefWidth="150" style="-fx-background-color: #1a1f1e; -fx-text-fill: white; -fx-border-color: #2a3139; -fx-border-radius: 10;"/> </VBox> </HBox>
<!-- Liste et formulaire --> <SplitPane dividerPositions="0.5" VBox.vgrow="ALWAYS"> <!-- Liste des personnages --> <ListView fx:id="personnageList" style="-fx-background-color: #1a1f1e; -fx-background-radius: 10; -fx-border-color: #2a3139; -fx-border-radius: 10;"/>
<!-- Formulaire d'édition --> <VBox spacing="10" style="-fx-padding: 15; -fx-background-color: #1a1f1e; -fx-background-radius: 10; -fx-border-color: #2a3139; -fx-border-radius: 10;"> <Label text="DÉTAILS" style="-fx-text-fill: #18E3A4; -fx-font-size: 16px; -fx-font-weight: bold;"/>
<TextField fx:id="nameField" promptText="Nom" style="-fx-background-color: #2a3139; -fx-text-fill: white; -fx-prompt-text-fill: #888; -fx-border-radius: 10;"/> <TextArea fx:id="descriptionArea" promptText="Description" prefHeight="80" style="-fx-background-color: #2a3139; -fx-text-fill: white; -fx-prompt-text-fill: #888; -fx-border-radius: 10;"/> <ComboBox fx:id="classRoleCombo" promptText="Classe" style="-fx-background-color: #2a3139; -fx-text-fill: white; -fx-border-radius: 10;"/> <ComboBox fx:id="universeCombo" promptText="Univers" style="-fx-background-color: #2a3139; -fx-text-fill: white; -fx-border-radius: 10;"/>
<HBox spacing="10"> <Button fx:id="selectImageBtn" text="Choisir portrait" onAction="#selectImage" style="-fx-background-color: #2a3139; -fx-text-fill: white; -fx-background-radius: 10; -fx-padding: 8 15;"/> <Button fx:id="saveBtn" text="Sauvegarder" onAction="#createPersonnage" style="-fx-background-color: #18E3A4; -fx-text-fill: #0b0f10; -fx-background-radius: 10; -fx-padding: 8 15; -fx-font-weight: bold;"/> <Button fx:id="deleteBtn" text="Supprimer" onAction="#deletePersonnage" style="-fx-background-color: #ff6b6b; -fx-text-fill: white; -fx-background-radius: 10; -fx-padding: 8 15;"/> </HBox>
<ImageView fx:id="portraitView" fitWidth="200" fitHeight="200" preserveRatio="true" style="-fx-background-color: #2a3139; -fx-background-radius: 10;"/>
<Button text="Retour à l'accueil" onAction="#goAccueil" style="-fx-background-color: transparent; -fx-border-color: #18E3A4; -fx-text-fill: #18E3A4; -fx-background-radius: 10; -fx-padding: 10;"/> </VBox> </SplitPane>
</VBox>
</AnchorPane>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<?import javafx.scene.layout.*?> <?import javafx.scene.control.*?> <?import javafx.scene.image.*?> <?import javafx.geometry.Insets?> <?import javafx.scene.text.*?>
<AnchorPane xmlns="http://javafx.com/javafx/17" xmlns:fx="http://javafx.com/fxml" fx:controller="com.example.app.controllers.PersonnageController" style="-fx-background-color: #0d1117;">
<fx:include source="partials/header.fxml" AnchorPane.leftAnchor="0" AnchorPane.rightAnchor="0" AnchorPane.topAnchor="0"/>
<VBox spacing="15" AnchorPane.leftAnchor="0" AnchorPane.rightAnchor="0" AnchorPane.topAnchor="100" AnchorPane.bottomAnchor="0">
<padding> <Insets top="20" right="20" bottom="20" left="20"/> </padding>
<Label text="PERSONNAGES" style="-fx-text-fill: #18E3A4; -fx-font-size: 28px; -fx-font-weight: bold;"/>
<!-- Barre de recherche --> <HBox spacing="10"> <TextField fx:id="searchField" promptText="Rechercher un personnage..." HBox.hgrow="ALWAYS" style="-fx-background-color: #1a1f1e; -fx-text-fill: white; -fx-prompt-text-fill: #888; -fx-border-color: #2a3139; -fx-border-radius: 10;"/> <Button text="Rechercher" onAction="#search" style="-fx-background-color: #18E3A4; -fx-text-fill: #0b0f10; -fx-background-radius: 10; -fx-padding: 8 15;"/> <Button text="Réinitialiser" onAction="#resetFilters" style="-fx-background-color: transparent; -fx-border-color: #18E3A4; -fx-text-fill: #18E3A4; -fx-background-radius: 10; -fx-padding: 8 15;"/> <Button text="Créer" onAction="#createPersonnage" style="-fx-background-color: #18E3A4; -fx-text-fill: #0b0f10; -fx-background-radius: 10; -fx-padding: 8 15;"/> </HBox>
<!-- Filtres --> <HBox spacing="20"> <VBox spacing="5"> <Label text="Classe" style="-fx-text-fill: #18E3A4; -fx-font-size: 14px; -fx-font-weight: bold;"/> <ListView fx:id="classRoleFilter" prefHeight="200" prefWidth="150" style="-fx-background-color: #1a1f1e; -fx-border-color: #2a3139; -fx-border-radius: 10;"/> </VBox> <VBox spacing="5"> <Label text="Univers" style="-fx-text-fill: #18E3A4; -fx-font-size: 14px; -fx-font-weight: bold;"/> <ListView fx:id="universeFilter" prefHeight="200" prefWidth="150" style="-fx-background-color: #1a1f1e; -fx-border-color: #2a3139; -fx-border-radius: 10;"/> </VBox> <VBox spacing="5"> <Label text="Trier par" style="-fx-text-fill: #18E3A4; -fx-font-size: 14px; -fx-font-weight: bold;"/> <ComboBox fx:id="sortCombo" prefWidth="150" style="-fx-background-color: #1a1f1e; -fx-text-fill: white; -fx-border-color: #2a3139; -fx-border-radius: 10;"/> </VBox> </HBox>
<!-- Liste et formulaire --> <SplitPane dividerPositions="0.5" VBox.vgrow="ALWAYS"> <!-- Liste des personnages --> <ListView fx:id="personnageList" style="-fx-background-color: #1a1f1e; -fx-background-radius: 10; -fx-border-color: #2a3139; -fx-border-radius: 10;"/>
<!-- Formulaire d'édition --> <VBox spacing="10" style="-fx-padding: 15; -fx-background-color: #1a1f1e; -fx-background-radius: 10; -fx-border-color: #2a3139; -fx-border-radius: 10;"> <Label text="DÉTAILS" style="-fx-text-fill: #18E3A4; -fx-font-size: 16px; -fx-font-weight: bold;"/>
<TextField fx:id="nameField" promptText="Nom" style="-fx-background-color: #2a3139; -fx-text-fill: white; -fx-prompt-text-fill: #888; -fx-border-radius: 10;"/> <TextArea fx:id="descriptionArea" promptText="Description" prefHeight="80" style="-fx-background-color: #2a3139; -fx-text-fill: white; -fx-prompt-text-fill: #888; -fx-border-radius: 10;"/> <ComboBox fx:id="classRoleCombo" promptText="Classe" style="-fx-background-color: #2a3139; -fx-text-fill: white; -fx-border-radius: 10;"/> <ComboBox fx:id="universeCombo" promptText="Univers" style="-fx-background-color: #2a3139; -fx-text-fill: white; -fx-border-radius: 10;"/>
<HBox spacing="10"> <Button fx:id="selectImageBtn" text="Choisir portrait" onAction="#selectImage" style="-fx-background-color: #2a3139; -fx-text-fill: white; -fx-background-radius: 10; -fx-padding: 8 15;"/> <Button fx:id="saveBtn" text="Sauvegarder" onAction="#createPersonnage" style="-fx-background-color: #18E3A4; -fx-text-fill: #0b0f10; -fx-background-radius: 10; -fx-padding: 8 15; -fx-font-weight: bold;"/> <Button fx:id="deleteBtn" text="Supprimer" onAction="#deletePersonnage" style="-fx-background-color: #ff6b6b; -fx-text-fill: white; -fx-background-radius: 10; -fx-padding: 8 15;"/> </HBox>
<ImageView fx:id="portraitView" fitWidth="200" fitHeight="200" preserveRatio="true" style="-fx-background-color: #2a3139; -fx-background-radius: 10;"/>
<Button text="Retour à l'accueil" onAction="#goAccueil" style="-fx-background-color: transparent; -fx-border-color: #18E3A4; -fx-text-fill: #18E3A4; -fx-background-radius: 10; -fx-padding: 10;"/> </VBox> </SplitPane>
</VBox>
</AnchorPane>
